sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-03-11 06:25
- Distance: 6.6 km
- Moving time: 37:36
- Elapsed time: 37:48
- Elevation gain: 107.4 m
- Average heart rate: 161.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 225 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `161.5 bpm`, ranging from `89.0` to `179.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `158.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `164.2 bpm` (+5.3 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `170.5 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `200.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `171.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `170.0 spm` (-1.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:39 /km` across `6.649 km` in `37:36` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:36 /km` and second-half pace was `5:42 /km` (+6 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `161.7 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `159.0 bpm` in the first half and `164.4 bpm` in the second (+5.4 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `37:36` out of `37:48` elapsed (99.5%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `113.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `29.2 m` and `62.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `54.8 m` in the first half and `59.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
